response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform experience; their work is predominantly in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with only brief C++ exposure in academic or minor roles, and no evidence of leading cloud compute platforms or mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers as required.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility across languages and domains
Proven open-source contributions and technical mentoring through workshops
Experience with distributed systems and high-performance applications
concerns: No demonstrated 8+ years of C++ programming as required
Lacks direct experience with cloud compute platforms or large-scale infrastructure leadership
No evidence of technical leadership in cloud or DevOps engineering teams
